---
title: "ch03: DEAアプローチ"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(Benchmarking)
```

```{r}
x <- matrix(c(100, 200, 300, 500, 100, 200, 600), ncol = 1)
y <- matrix(c(75, 100, 300, 400, 25, 50, 400), ncol = 1)

dea.plot.frontier(x, y, txt = TRUE)
dea.plot.frontier(x, y, txt = TRUE, RTS = "drs")
dea.plot.frontier(x, y, txt = TRUE, RTS = "crs")
dea.plot.frontier(x, y, txt = TRUE, RTS = "vrs")
dea.plot.frontier(x, y, txt = TRUE, RTS = "irs")
dea.plot.frontier(x, y, txt = TRUE, RTS = "irs2")

dea.plot(x, y, txt = TRUE, ORIENTATION = "in")
dea.plot(x, y, txt = TRUE, ORIENTATION = "in-out")
```


```{r}
e <- dea(x, y)
eff(e)

(1 - eff(e)) * x
summary(e)
```
```{r}
el <- dea(x, y, SLACK = TRUE)

data.frame(el$eff, el$slack, el$sx, el$sy)
```
